scripts.build: npm run build -w @reharik/smart-enum && npm run build -w @reharik/smart-enum-knex && npm run build -w @reharik/graphql-codegen-smart-enum && npm run build -w @reharik/graphql-codegen-smart-enum-type-policies
scripts.test: npm run test -w @reharik/smart-enum && npm run test -w @reharik/smart-enum-knex && npm run test -w @reharik/graphql-codegen-smart-enum && npm run test -w @reharik/graphql-codegen-smart-enum-type-policies
scripts.dance: npm run build && npm run test && npm run lint
